headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Corteva, Archer Daniels Midland, The Scotts, Miracle-Gro, Adecoagro and Mission Produce
summary: Agriculture stocks are tapping innovation, healthier food trends and global demand, despite cost pressures and commodity volatility.
